text:
The Republic of Padokea (, Padokia Kyōwakoku), in the Hunter × Hunter world, is a country composed of several parts including the Dentora Region (, Dentora-chiku) where Kukuroo Mountain is located. Access to the country is free, with no special conditions to be met. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 38 

Trivia

In the real world, the Republic of Padokea is mostly in Algeria and the current Maghreb region, or Northwest Africa, a region composed of the countries of Algeria, Morocco, Tunisia, Libya, and Egypt.
